items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
items.description: In the latest trading session, McDonald's (MCD) closed at $314.5, marking a -1.33% move from the previous day.

items.title: 75-year-old fast food chain closing 200 restaurants, fights to survive
items.description: When people get more conservative with spending, it hurts restaurants that lack a true following. Some people love chains such as Chipotle, Chick-fil-A, Starbucks, and even McDonald's. They view spending money at those brands as a reasonable indulgence, something they may not truly be able to ...

items.title: Darden Gears Up to Post Q2 Earnings: Here's What You Must Know
items.description: DRI is set to report Q2 FY26 earnings on Dec. 18. EPS is projected at $2.10, with Olive Garden and LongHorn expected to lead revenue growth amid cost pressure.

items.title: SHIFT Communications Earns Chief Marketer, PRNEWS & PR Club Awards for Consumer PR Work with McDonald’s
